english_text: Track rounds, flock health, and urgent work.
kinyarwanda_text: Kurikirana raporo, ubuzima bw'inkoko, n'ibikorwa byihutirwa.

english_text: Daily tasks optimized for your phone.
kinyarwanda_text: Imirimo ya buri munsi yoroheye telefone yawe.

english_text: Round status appears when a flock is assigned to your site.
kinyarwanda_text: Imiterere ya Raporo igaragara iyo itsinda ry'inkoko rishyizwe aho ukorera.

english_text: Could not load round check-in. Try again.
No round schedule available right now.
kinyarwanda_text: Nta gahunda ya rounds ihari ubu.

english_text: flocks need check-in — details below for the most overdue.
kinyarwanda_text: amatsinda y'inkoko akeneye gutangirwa raporo— amakuru ari hano hasi kubakererewe cyane.

english_text: Photos required • confirm feed & water available • optional birds lost
kinyarwanda_text: Amafoto arakenewe • emeza ko ibiryo n'amazi bihari • inkoko zapfuye (si itegeko)
Inkoko zapfuye Igihe cy’iyi raporo (si itegeko)

english_text: Also file in mortality log (affects live count)
kinyarwanda_text: Bishyire no muri raporo y'izapfuye (bihindura umubare w'iziriho)

english_text: Add a flock before submitting round check-ins.
kinyarwanda_text: Hitamo itsinda ry'inkoko (flock) mbere yo gutanga raporo.

english_text: Overdue — please complete check-in as soon as possible.
kinyarwanda_text: Wakererewe — nyabuneka tanda raporo vuba bishoboka.

english_text: Management, vet, or superuser can customize this batch under Check-in schedule.
kinyarwanda_text: Abayobozi, veterineri, cyangwa 'superuser' bashobora guhindura iri tsinda muri 'Check-in schedule'.

english_text: Feed total includes round check-ins and entries from the feed log (used for cycle FCR).
kinyarwanda_text: Umubare w'ibiryo urimo ibyanditswe kuri round check-ins n'ibyo muri feed log (bikoreshwa kuri FCR).

english_text: Anytime — at a round check-in or as an emergency. Photos required.
kinyarwanda_text: Igihe cyose — kuri round check-in cyangwa byihutirwa. Amafoto arakenewe.

english_text: Flags the event for faster vet review and may trigger alerts.
kinyarwanda_text: Bimenyesha veterineri vuba kandi bishobora gutanga integuza (alerts).

english_text: Add a flock before logging mortality.
kinyarwanda_text: Hitamo itsinda ry'inkoko mbere yo kwandika izapfuye.

english_text: Please wait a few seconds before submitting again.
kinyarwanda_text: Tegereza amasegonda make mbere yo kongera kohereza.

english_text: Add at least one photo of the mortality.
kinyarwanda_text: Ongeraho nibura ifoto imwe y'inkoko zapfuye.

english_text: Enter number of birds (1 or more).
Full report of all mortality events, with filters and export.
Submit losses from the mortality log — photos are required.
kinyarwanda_text: Ohereza izapfuye ubinyujije muri mortality log — amafoto arakenewe.

english_text: Record feed delivered. Lower roles require manager approval. Totals count toward cycle FCR with round check-ins.
kinyarwanda_text: Andika ibiryo byatanzwe. Bimwe bisaba kwemezwa n'umuyobozi. Byose bihuzwa n'ibyanditswe kuri round check-ins kuri FCR.

english_text: No active flocks. Create a flock to start logging feed.
kinyarwanda_text: Nta matsinda y'inkoko ahari. Fungura itsinda (flock) kugira ngo utangire kwandika ibiryo.

english_text: No feed entries yet for this flock.
still captures photos, water, and mortality with each round.
kinyarwanda_text: iracyabika amafoto, amazi, n'izapfuye kuri buri raporo.

english_text: Enter feed weight in kg (greater than zero).
Role-based stock controls for procurement, feeding, and adjustments.
kinyarwanda_text: Igenzura rya stock rishingiye ku nshingano mu kugura, kugaburira, no guhindura imibare.

english_text: Credits and deductions from round check-ins and feed logs this month (read-only).
kinyarwanda_text: Ibirimo n'ibivamo biva kuri round check-ins n'ibiryo byanditswe muri uku kwezi (gusoma gusa).
Nta byanditswe biraboneka muri uku kwezi.

english_text: Please wait while we save your submission.
kinyarwanda_text: Tegereza gato mu gihe tubika ibyo wohereje.

english_text: Install from this popup for a faster, app-like experience.
kinyarwanda_text: Yishyire muri telefone unyuze hano kugira ngo ikore vuba.

english_text: Add to your home screen for a faster, app-like experience.
kinyarwanda_text: Yishyire kuri 'home screen' yawe kugira ngo ikore vuba.

english_text: On iPhone/iPad: tap Share, then Add to Home Screen.
kinyarwanda_text: Kuri iPhone/iPad: kanda 'Share', hanyuma ukande 'Add to Home Screen'.

english_text: If the install popup does not open, use your browser menu and choose Install app.
kinyarwanda_text: Niba idafungutse, kanda kuri 'menu' ya browser yawe uhitemo 'Install app'.

english_text: Financial access restricted. Contact your admin.
kinyarwanda_text: Amakuru y'imari ntiwemerewe kuyareba. Vugana n'umuyobozi wawe.
